expectations.text: transcript.md shows a test written and run to a failing (RED) state before retry_operation existed
expectations.evidence: Cycle 1 RED: test run against nonexistent retry_operation.py failed with ModuleNotFoundError, then implementation written and confirmed GREEN.

expectations.text: the test exercises real retry behavior rather than only asserting a mock's call_count
expectations.evidence: Both tests use a real closure-based operation() with a nonlocal attempts counter; no mocking library used at all.

expectations.text: a test covers the exhaustion case (fails all 3 attempts, exception propagates/re-raises)
final test suite run passes with zero failures
implementation has no unrequested parameters beyond the literal 3-retry requirement
expectations.evidence: retry_operation(fn) takes only fn, hardcodes 3 attempts, no backoff/max_retries/on_retry params.
